top_signals.title: Trump says Iran deal reopening Strait of Hormuz 'largely negotiated' and will be announced soon
top_signals.summary: A fragile ceasefire has been in place since April 8, punctuated by skirmishes as the U.S. and Iran jockey over the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
